title: Mouthwatering Wood Fired Tunisian Pear Tagine
description: A plant-based friendly Tunisian dish featuring pears, wood-fired baked in a corn husk wrap, with a floral and cheese-pull crowd-pleaser flavor

ingredients.name: Vegan cheese shreds
ingredients.notes: such as soy cheese or nut cheese

instructions: Preheat the wood fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together sliced pears, chopped onion, minced garlic, grated ginger, ground cumin, and ground coriander.
Brush the corn husk wraps with olive oil and fill each wrap with the pear mixture and vegan cheese shreds.
Fold the corn husk wraps to enclose the filling and place them in the wood fired oven.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the corn husk wraps are lightly browned and the filling is heated through.
Remove the tagines from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the tagines cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
